reviews.comment:
Bueno...el café más grande es: MINI. Y no entiendo xq no te hacen descuento con YPF....sólo socios del ACA. Los empleados divinos.

(Translated by Google)
Well...the biggest coffee shop is MINI. And I don't understand why they don't give you a discount with YPF...only for ACA members. The employees are wonderful.
